text: Run a real bootstrap trial in a fresh host project

Has been done immediately before v0.2.0, which resulted in significant improvement. But the installation and embedding are still somewhat awkward, maybe there are ways to improve it. Also skill-embedding has not fully been tested

main remaining gap per last run: skill-embedding not fully tested (symlink path fix was just landed in this session). Next trial should specifically exercise: install in repo with existing .claude/, verify skill shows up to agent, verify agent can use git toc alias.

Now that Codex, Claude, and humans are all intended first-class users, the next bootstrap trial should explicitly test all three perspectives: repo install, Claude skill exposure, git toc alias usability, and whether a cold agent can discover the workflow from README + SKILL + AGENTS without extra chat guidance.
Related bootstrap work: see T-81 for a concrete single-command bootstrap flow ticket. T-41 remains useful as the real-world validation/host-project trial for that experience.
did another round of bootstrap tests with claude, codex and copilot after recent changes to setup-procedure and directory layout.
